com.pax.poslink

Class PaymentResponse

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.base.BaseResponse<PaymentResponse>
      • com.pax.poslink.PaymentResponse

  • public class PaymentResponse
extends BaseResponse<PaymentResponse>
    Payment transaction response properties

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      AddlRspData AddlRspData
      Response AddlRspData
      java.lang.String ApprovedAmount
      Approved amount, returned by the host, the format is $$$$$$$CC except LOYALTY, if the EDC type is LOYALTY, this field is the approved points.
      If the transaction type is not “BALANCE”, this field is mandatory.
      java.lang.String ApprovedCashBackAmount
      The cash back amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
      java.lang.String ApprovedMerchantFee
      The surcharge fee/Merchant fee approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
      java.lang.String ApprovedTaxAmount
      The tax amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
      java.lang.String ApprovedTipAmount
      The tip amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.
      java.lang.String AuthCode
      Returns the transaction auth code from the payment processor .
      java.lang.String AuthorizationResponse
      Original authorization data used in follow up transactions.
      java.lang.String AvsResponse
      AVS response.
      java.lang.String BogusAccountNum
      Bogus account number.

      Response CardInfo

      Displays the card type used.

      CVV response code .

      The debit account Type.

      ECR transaction ID, unique code in ECR side.

      Balance extra on card .

      The transaction reference number returned from a gateway directly.

      The gift card type.

      Returned by the host, last 4 digits of account number for transaction.
      java.lang.String HostCardType
      Returned by the host, the card type used in the transaction.

      Payment processing host reference number.

      Additional detailed message or code returned from the host

      Payment processing host response.

      This information is stored for the integrator for receipts, additional details on a transaction decline, reporting, etc.

      Valid when EDC type is Credit or Debit.

      Host returned error message.

      Response MultiMerchant

      Host-specific data, formatted according to host specifications.

      The unique identifier is associated with a specific cardholder PAN.
      Non-sensitive value that can be stored/managed in place of a PAN or Token.
      Typically used for card-brand loyalty benefits.

    • Field Detail

      • AuthCode

        public java.lang.String AuthCode
        Returns the transaction auth code from the payment processor .

        Attribute: ans…10

      • ApprovedAmount

        public java.lang.String ApprovedAmount
        Approved amount, returned by the host, the format is $$$$$$$CC except LOYALTY, if the EDC type is LOYALTY, this field is the approved points.
        If the transaction type is not “BALANCE”, this field is mandatory.

        Attribute: n…9

        Displays the actual amount approved by the host. This could be different from the requested amount

      • AvsResponse

        public java.lang.String AvsResponse
        AVS response.

        Attribute: ans…8

        Displays the AVS response

      • BogusAccountNum

        public java.lang.String BogusAccountNum
        Bogus account number.

        Attribute: n…19

        Two conditions:

        1. Displays the last 4.
        2. Display the full account number
        It depends on terminal configuration

      • CardType

        public java.lang.String CardType
        Displays the card type used.

        Attribute: var

        See CardType for definition.

        Card type determined by bin range.

      • CvResponse

        public java.lang.String CvResponse

        CVV response code .

        Attribute: ans…8

      • HostCode

        public java.lang.String HostCode
        Payment processing host reference number.

        Attribute: ans…32

      • HostResponse

        public java.lang.String HostResponse
        Payment processing host response.

        Attribute: ans…8

      • Message

        public java.lang.String Message
        Host returned error message. If host returns error message, this field is mandatory.

        Attribute: ans…255

      • RefNum

        public java.lang.String RefNum
        Reference Number/Transaction Number

        Attribute: n…4

        0 < Index <= 5000, normal data base. 5000 < Index <= 9000, stored data base for SAF. 9000 < Index <= 9999, failed data base for SAF.

      • RawResponse

        public java.lang.String RawResponse
        Gateway raw response.

      • RemainingBalance

        public java.lang.String RemainingBalance
        Balance remaining on card .

        Attribute: n…9

        If the EDC is GIFT The card holder’s balance, $$$$$$$CC. If the EDC is EBT, this is the cash benefits balance. Or LOYALTY or CREDIT, this is host returned balance.

      • ExtraBalance

        public java.lang.String ExtraBalance
        Balance extra on card .

        Attribute: n…9

        The card holder’s balance, $$$$$$$CC. If the EDC is EBT, this is the food stamp balance. If the EDC is LOYALTY, this field will be the host returned additional balance.

      • RequestedAmount

        public java.lang.String RequestedAmount
        Original requested amount of the transaction .

        Attribute: n…9

      • ResultCode

        public java.lang.String ResultCode
        Result code of transaction. Used to determine results of transaction.

        Attribute: ans6

      • ResultTxt

        public java.lang.String ResultTxt
        Result Txt of transaction.

        Attribute: ans…32

        See ResultCode & ResultTxt for definition.

        Review result txt for details about the transaction.

      • Timestamp

        public java.lang.String Timestamp
        Time/date stamp of transaction

        Attribute: n14

      • SigFileName

        public java.lang.String SigFileName
        FileName of captured signature.

        Attribute: var

        Ex: 201108111743.png

        For Java on PC, if SigSavePath was not set, it will be saved at <execute directory>\img\receipts\201108111743.bmp
        For Android, if SigSavePath and appDataFolder are not set, it will use the AbstractPosLink.appDataFolder + "/img/receipt/" to save the signature.

      • SignData

        public java.lang.String SignData
        Signature data captured by terminal for current

        Attribute: ans…3072

      • TransactionIntegrityClass

        public java.lang.String TransactionIntegrityClass
        Transaction Integrity Class is assigned by MasterCard for a U.S. merchant in an authorization response message

        Attribute: an…10

      • ExtData

        public java.lang.String ExtData
        Catch all for additional transaction information

        Extended data in XML format.

        Example:<TagName>x</TagName>

        See PaymentResponse ExtData for definition.

      • GiftCardType

        public java.lang.String GiftCardType
        The gift card type.

        Values:
        C - Custom Value Gift Card
        P - Predetermine Value Gift Card

        Attribute: a1

        Since:
        V1.04.00

        public java.lang.String TransactionRemainingAmount
        Any amount of the original authorization remaining after this void/refund, $$$$$$$CC.

        Attribute: n...9

        Since:
        V1.04.00

      • DebitAccountType

        public java.lang.String DebitAccountType
        The debit account Type.

        C - Checking.
        S - Saving.
        D - Default.

        Attribute: a1

        Since:
        V1.05.00

      • MaskedPAN

        public java.lang.String MaskedPAN
        Valid when EDC type is Credit or Debit.

        First 6 and last 4
        Example: 5454545****5454

        Attribute: ans...32

        Since:
        V1.06.00

      • PaymentService2000

        public java.lang.String PaymentService2000
        Original Payment Service 2000

        Data returned as part of the original authorization response from the issuer, used in follow up transactions (token/card-on-file, reversals, incremental). Format varies by card scheme.

        Attribute: ans...22

        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • AuthorizationResponse

        public java.lang.String AuthorizationResponse
        Original authorization data used in follow up transactions.

        Attribute: ans...66

        Since:
        V1.08.00

        public java.lang.String IssuerResponseCode
        This information is stored for the integrator for receipts, additional details on a transaction decline, reporting, etc.

        Attribute: an2

        Since:
        V1.08.00

      • ECRTransID

        public java.lang.String ECRTransID
        ECR transaction ID, unique code in ECR side. Please check Host Specific Remarks for details about field attributes.
        This field is returned by the host.

        Attribute: ans..64

        Since:
        V1.09.01

      • ApprovedTipAmount

        public java.lang.String ApprovedTipAmount
        The tip amount approved by the host, $$$$$$$CC.

    • Constructor Detail

      • PaymentResponse

        public PaymentResponse()

    • Method Detail

      • ConvertSigToPic

        public int ConvertSigToPic(java.lang.String sigdata,
                           java.lang.String type,
                           java.lang.String outFilepath)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        This is not supported in Android.
        convert signature data to picture of specific type
        Parameters:
        sigdata - signature data
        type - format type. Supported format(case insensitive): jpg,bmp,jpeg,png.
        outFilepath - a pathname of File to be written to.
        Returns:
        0: success; -1: sigdata is invalid; -2: outfilepath is invalid; -3: invalid format type.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException -
        Example: PaymentResponse paymentresponse = new PaymentResponse();
        paymentresponse.ConvertSigToPic(paymentresponse.SigData, "bmp", "D:\\JAVA\\SIG.bmp");

      • unpack

        protected void unpack(PaymentResponse srcResponse)
        Specified by:
        unpack in class BaseResponse<PaymentResponse>
